Localization.Description: A hidden scheduled task creation or a hidden modification of an existing scheduled task has been detected without being written to the Windows event log. Creating a task or modifying it can be done directly in the registry, without using the Windows Task Scheduler

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The scheduled task "{object.name}" was modified on host {event_src.host}
The hidden scheduled task "{object.name}" was created on host {event_src.host}
The scheduled task with ID {object.id} was modified on host {event_src.host}
